lightpanda.description: MANDATORY browser for all web tasks. 9x faster than Chrome, 16x less memory. NEVER use Chrome.

gitnexus.description: Codebase map and analysis. Use to understand project structure before coding.

supermemory.description: Long-term memory across sessions. Check before every task, save learnings after.

openviking.description: Codebase context memory. Stores what was changed and why.

nano-banana.description: Image generation via Gemini. Use for UI mockups, icons, brand assets.
